title: Reminders on Monday
excerpt:
I think Monday must have reminders options like other applications. 
I’m using the reminder app on my Mac and iPhone, and it will be great if this feature will be on Monday. 
Thanks

posts.author: Shayke103 (Shay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think Monday must have reminders options like other applications.
I’m using the reminder app on my Mac and iPhone, and it will be great if this feature will be on Monday.

Thanks

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Shayke,

Firstly, welcome to the community! Excited to have you with us
I think you’re probably referring to reminders for upcoming due dates. We already have this feature available using the automations: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000227739-Due-Date-Alerts-and-Reminders-with-Automations?abcb=91446

Is that what you’re looking for?

posts.author: benny192 (Ben Gillis)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to associate reminders with the time of an event/item? Currently, it just looks like reminders can be associated with dates.
